mapper.select: SELECT id, dormitory_id, name, area, capacity, rent, status, remark, is_deleted, created_at FROM rooms WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, dormitory_id, name, area, capacity, rent, status, remark, is_deleted, created_at FROM rooms WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY name

SELECT r.id, r.dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, d.type AS dormitory_type, r.name, r.area, r.capacity, r.rent, r.status, r.remark, r.created_at, COALESCE(active.cnt, 0) AS resident_count FROM rooms r INNER JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = r.dormitory_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM residences WHERE status = 'active'
AND (expected_checkout_date IS NULL OR expected_checkout_date >= #{date})
GROUP BY room_id ) active ON active.room_id = r.id WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status IN ('available', 'occupied') AND COALESCE(active.cnt, 0) < r.capacity
AND d.type = #{gender}
ORDER BY r.dormitory_id, r.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rooms (dormitory_id, name, area, capacity, rent, status, remark, is_deleted, created_at) VALUES (#{dormitoryId}, #{name}, #{area}, #{capacity}, #{rent}, 'available', #{remark}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE rooms SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rooms SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms r INNER JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = r.dormitory_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 AND d.status = 'active' WHERE r.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms r INNER JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = r.dormitory_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 AND d.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) AS active_cnt FROM residences WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY room_id ) ar ON ar.room_id = r.id WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status IN ('available', 'occupied') AND COALESCE(ar.active_cnt, 0) < r.capacity

SELECT d.id, d.name, COUNT(r.id) AS totalRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(ar.active_cnt, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS occupiedRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(ar.active_cnt, 0) < r.capacity AND r.status IN ('available', 'occupied') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS availableRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(ar.active_cnt, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS residentCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(0, COALESCE(r.capacity, 0) - COALESCE(ar.active_cnt, 0)) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS availableCapacity, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(r.capacity, 0)), 0) AS totalCapacity FROM dormitories d LEFT JOIN rooms r ON r.dormitory_id = d.id AND r.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) AS active_cnt FROM residences WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY room_id ) ar ON ar.room_id = r.id WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 AND d.status = 'active' GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY d.id

SELECT r.id AS roomId, r.name AS roomName, r.capacity, COALESCE(ar.active_cnt, 0) AS residentCount, res.id AS residenceId, e.id AS employeeId, e.name AS employeeName, e.type AS employeeType, e.department AS department, DATE_FORMAT(res.checkin_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS checkinDate, DATE_FORMAT(res.checkout_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS checkoutDate FROM rooms r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) AS active_cnt FROM residences WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY room_id ) ar ON ar.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN residences res ON res.room_id = r.id AND res.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN employees e ON e.id = res.employee_id AND e.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.name, e.name

SELECT r.id, r.name, r.area, r.capacity, d.name AS dormitory_name, d.type AS dormitory_type, COALESCE(active.cnt, 0) AS current_occupancy, (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(res2.checkout_date), '%Y-%m-%d') FROM residences res2 WHERE res2.room_id = r.id AND res2.checkout_date IS NOT NULL) AS last_checkout FROM rooms r INNER JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = r.dormitory_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM residences WHERE status = 'active'
AND (expected_checkout_date IS NULL OR expected_checkout_date >= #{date})
GROUP BY room_id ) active ON active.room_id = r.id WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status IN ('available', 'occupied') AND COALESCE(active.cnt, 0) < r.capacity
AND d.type = #{gender}
ORDER BY d.id, r.name
SELECT id, dormitory_id, name, rent FROM rooms WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY dormitory_id, name
